nodes.context: Camorra clan based in Afragola, operating in lower Lazio and Caserta, involved in construction, drug trafficking, and control of shopping centers.
Powerful Camorra clan from Casal di Principe, involved in drug trafficking and construction.
Camorra clan from Sessa Aurunca, allied with the Magliulo clan.
Camorra clan from Afragola, rival of the Magliulo clan in a feud over construction contracts.
Camorra clan from Torre del Greco, from which a splinter faction led by Gaetano Magliulo split.

edges.context: The Magliulo had close ties with the Casalesi clan; Mario Magliulo was a co-founder and brother-in-law of boss Antonio Bardellino.
The Magliulo had direct contacts with the Esposito clan of Sessa Aurunca.
The Magliulo and Moccia clans were involved in a bloody feud over construction contracts for the Rione Salicelle.
Gaetano Magliulo led a splinter faction from the Falanga clan, indicating a breakaway from the original clan.
